node_1.excerpt: A browser extension is a small software module that changes or extends a web browser .
node_1.fallbackText: A browser extension is a small software module that changes or extends a web browser. Common extension uses include productivity tools, filtering, password management, page translation, accessibility helpers, and developer utilities.
